query: SELECT table_name, column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name IN ('nightlyAgendaEmails','dailyRecapRequests','weekly_digests','icalFeeds','icalEvents') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT table_name, column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name IN ('nightlyAgendaEmails','dailyRecapRequests','weekly_digests','icalFeeds','icalEvents') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;
